{"step_by_step_thinking": "The query is about the time taken for separation through rubber ring or band. Reviewing the documents, Document [7] (Title: Hemorrhoid Banding -- Technique or Treatment) states 'Successful ligation induces thrombosis within the hemorrhoid, leading to localized submucosal scarring.
